transcript:
CALLER: Hello. Mujhe yeh jaanna tha ki aapka clinic Pune mein kaun si bus routes se accessible hai.
AGENT: Ji zaroor. Humara clinic Baner Road pe hai. PMPML ki route number 155 aur 199 yahan se guzarti hain. Nearest bus stop Balewadi Phata hai, wahan se 5 minute ki walk hai.
CALLER: Auto ya rickshaw milti hai wahan se?
AGENT: Haan, Balewadi Phata pe autorickshaw easily milti hai. Cab service bhi aati hai directly clinic tak. Hum Google Maps pe bhi listed hain — Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic search karein.
CALLER: Achha, ek aur cheez — lift hai andar ya sirf stairs?
AGENT: Hamare paas elevator hai. Differently-abled patients ke liye ramp bhi available hai ground floor pe.
CALLER: Bahut acha. Dhanyawaad.
